setup_rules: Identify a mock trend condition before any signal review.
Require price to pull back into a planned review zone.
Mark market regime before scoring the mock signal.
entry_rules: Entry is mock-only and may not place orders.
Signal must reach a confluence score of 70 or higher for mock ledger review.
Risk state must be approved by the Risk Agent before any mock execution ledger entry.
exit_rules: Define invalidation before mock signal approval.
Record planned exit reason in the mock journal.
Close mock review if regime changes to UNKNOWN or unsafe.
